structurecompass.configuration.compassRa: Sets the range in blocks in which the structure compasses can locate structures
structurecompass.configuration.locateAsy: Defines if the structure compass should locate structures asynchronously
structurecompass.configuration.locateUne: Defines if the structure compass should only locate unexplored structures. A structure is tagged as explored when the compass is used to find it.
structurecompass.configuration.structure:
Defines which structures can't be searched with the Structure Compass
(Supports wildcard *, Example: 'minecraft:*' will blacklist anything in the minecraft domain)
structurecompass.configuration.title: Structure Compass Config
structurecompass.locate.fail: Bound structure could not be located nearby
structurecompass.locate.structure_prohib: You are not allowed to locate this structure
structurecompass.screen.selection.select: Structure selected, right-click the compass to locate it
structurecompass.screen.selection.title: Structure Selection
structurecompass.structure.failed: %s can not be located within a %s block radius. Please explore further and try again later
structurecompass.structure.failed.toolti: %s can not be located, perhaps try again later
structurecompass.structure.found: %s has been located %s blocks away, compass is pointing towards the structure
structurecompass.structure.found.tooltip: %s has been located, compass is pointing towards the structure
structurecompass.structure.unset.tooltip: No structure has been set, shift right-click to select a structure
structurecompass.structure.wrong_dimensi: You are not in the dimension in which %s was found
